title: Humanize: Turn AI text into natural human writing in one click | Product Hunt
byline: Md Israk Jahin Tasin Biz Account
excerpt: Humanize.sh is a free AI Humanizer and AI detector that transforms ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude text into natural, undetectable human writing. Instantly check and humanize your AI-generated content. No signup required.
content_html: Humanize.sh is a free AI Humanizer and AI detector that transforms ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude text into natural, undetectable human writing. Instantly check and humanize your AI-generated content. No signup required.
content_text: Humanize.sh is a free AI Humanizer and AI detector that transforms ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude text into natural, undetectable human writing. Instantly check and humanize your AI-generated content. No signup required.

blocks.html_en: Humanize.sh is a free AI Humanizer and AI detector that transforms ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude text into natural, undetectable human writing. Instantly check and humanize your AI-generated content. No signup required.

sentences.zh: Humanize.sh 是一款免费的 AI Humanizer 和 AI 检测器，可将 ChatGPT、Gemini 和 Claude 文本转换为自然的、不可检测的人类书写。
